items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is susceptible to body shots.
items.quote: there's a few things that Paddy does where he leaves himself open to.
I think Paddy Pimblett's durability is real.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has been inactive for five years.
items.quote: Conor McGregor being out for 5 years

items.claim: Max Holloway has superior cardio compared to Conor McGregor.
items.quote: Max Holloway is a marathon runner. Max Holloway has volume. Max Holloway doesn't get tired, okay? ... And that's a huge weapon against Conor McGregor.

items.claim: Max Holloway has significantly improved his kicking game since his first fight with Conor McGregor.
items.quote: Max Holloway, his kicking game got a lot better. Way better.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is physically declining due to age and lifestyle factors.
items.quote: He's been out the game for 5 years. And he hasn't been running track and field for 5 years. He's been doing cocaine and getting in trouble.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's training camp environment lacks high-level sparring partners.
items.quote: You want world class fighters to push you. And what's funny is Max Holloway usually didn't have a big team but I don't know if you guys know this Jack Della Maddalena flew out to Hawaii to help Max Holloway for this camp.

items.claim: Max Holloway's camp was bolstered by high-level training partners like Jack Della Maddalena.
items.quote: Jack Della Maddalena flew out to Hawaii to help Max Holloway for this camp.
